title: ScimGroup
description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource representing a Contentstack user group.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs for this resource.

id.description: SCIM-assigned unique identifier for the group.

displayName.description: The display name of the group.

members.description: List of user members in the group.

value.description: The SCIM user ID of the group member.

display.description: The display name of the group member.
